text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha ha! I messed up big time... again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I feel like doing a somersault and crying from
the agony! This is Bakushin-level pain!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Bakushin-level pain... Would it perhaps be
beneficial to Bakushin in this condition?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Perhaps my Bakushin would be even greater?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A tricky situation can be an opportunity! This is
the perfect moment to grow as a class
representative!
choice_data_list: A good class representative would take a break!
...Do you really want to take the gamble?
...Do you really want to take the gamble?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A tricky situation can be an opportunity! This is
the perfect moment to grow as a class
representative!
choice_data_list: A good class representative would take a break!
...Do you really want to take the gamble?
...Do you really want to take the gamble?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying... instead of leading the students
as I should... doing this would make me the cause
of worry?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah... Ow... It hurts...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
N-no, that's not it! The pain I'm feeling now... is
coming from my heart!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I overlooked such a vital part of my duties... I'm
crying from the pain in my heart!

Sakura Bakushin O focuses on getting better
while reflecting deeply on her actions.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'm going to take the gamble!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait... Gamble? As in gambling?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: WAAIIIT! NO, NO! I take it back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was dangerous! Engaging in gambling would
be one step removed from delinquency!
choice_data_list: It's just a figure of speech...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No! I am a class representative on the straight
and narrow! I noticed my error, so I have to make
sure I keep on the right path!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
B-but... maybe a small gamble wouldn't hurt... As
a bit of social experiment...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
NO, NO, NO! What am I saying?! That is not how
one Bakushins down the road of the elite!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, Sakura Bakushin O! OPEN YOUR EYES!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... For some reason... I feel super tired...

Sakura Bakushin O wrestles hard with her
devotion as class representative. It may be that
she's just tired... or perhaps it is her injury acting
up.

To start, I'll have her stretch to see how she's
doing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well? What do you make of this flexibility! I've
improved, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Yes, indeed! It seems my theory was
correct!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for believing in me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now look upon me! My skills as a class
representative have reached a new level and
allowed me to overcome my injury!

Sure enough, she's able to resume her training
soon after. Whatever those skills may be, they are
impressive.
